item.title: More filler content
item.description: Nulla at quam sit amet lectus interdum blandit. Phasellus dolor velit, ullamcorper id justo vitae, hendrerit dictum elit. Curabitur cursus efficitur ex, in volutpat tortor. Nunc venenatis, mauris nec ultrices vulputate, libero ante volutpat ante, sit amet efficitur metus neque a diam. Nulla facilisi. Nam porta sagittis magna, et congue mi venenatis eu. Duis luctus, nisl sit amet volutpat semper, lorem quam congue tortor, eget finibus justo mi sit amet elit.

item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Education Oct 2015 - Jul 2019 > Ph.D. in theoretical physics (summa cum laude) Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research, Germany Humboldt-University Berlin, Germany Sep 2013 - May 2015 > M.Sc. in physics (honors) FAU Erlangen-Nuremberg, Germany University College London, United Kingdom Oct 2010 - Sep 2013 > B.Sc. in physics FAU Erlangen-Nuremberg, Germany Experience since May 2020 > Research Fellow School of Mathematics, University of Leeds, United Kingdom since Jan 2020 > Guest Researcher Department of Ecology and Evolutionary Biology, Princeton University, USA

item.title: Events
item.description: 2021 | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2017 | 2016 | 2015 | 2014 Upcoming Statistics Seminar Series, University of Leeds, Mar 12, 2021 Replicator Reinforcement Learning Dynamics in Multi-Agent Environment Systems (Virtual Talk) Past Events 2020 Princeton-Stockholm-Potsdam Resilience Initiative Workshop, Aug 14-21, 2020 How can cooperation maintain a resilient Earth system? (Virtual Talk) Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research, Potsdam, Germany, Jun 23 Caring for the future can turn tragedy into comedy for long-term collective action under risk of collapse (Virtual Talk)

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2021 | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2017 | 2016 In review Dynamical systems as a level of cognitive analysis of multi-agent learning - Algorithmic foundations of temporal-difference learning dynamics Barfuss W (2020) in review Stewardship of global collective behavior Bak-Coleman J, Alfano M, Barfuss W, Bergstrom C, Centeno MA, Couzin ID, Donges JF, Galesic M, Gersick AS, Jacquet J, Kao A, Gersick A, Patterson T, Romanczuk P, Rubenstein DI, Tombak K, Van Bavel JJ, Weber EU (2020)
